articles.title_en: An oil superpower that can’t fill its own gasoline tanks: How Ukraine’s drone war upended Russia’s fuel market
articles.lead_en: Shortages of gasoline and diesel have affected most of Russia’s regions, as well as the annexed areas of Ukraine, to one degree or another. Regional restrictions usually take the form of bans on filling canisters and limits on how much any one customer can buy.

articles.title_en: A night in photos: Kyiv takes another Russian strike while Ukraine hunts Russia’s refineries, an airfield, and its ‘shadow fleet’
articles.lead_en: Russian forces hit Kyiv again overnight into July 8, even as Ukraine’s military launched a fresh wave of attacks on Russia’s oil infrastructure. Ukrainian drones struck so-called shadow fleet tankers in the Sea of Azov, an industrial zone in Nizhnekamsk that’s home to two oil refineries, refineries in Saratov and Ufa, and a military airfield in Borisoglebsk, in the Voronezh region.
articles.title_raw: A night in photos: Kyiv takes another Russian strike while Ukraine hunts Russia’s refineries, an airfield, and its ‘shadow fleet’

articles.title_en: Times: NATO uses Palantir platform to track Russian troop movements

articles.title_en: Russia says Kostiantynivka has fallen. Kyiv claims it still holds the city. Both are wrong.
articles.lead_en: In recent days, alongside reports of drone and missile strikes on cities, factories, and gas stations, the state of the front lines has suddenly become a major topic of discussion — apparently because Donald Trump has returned as a mediator in the negotiations. Vladimir Putin told him about the fighting in the ruins of Kostiantynivka, in Ukraine’s Donetsk region — a key city the Russian president claims his army now holds.

articles.title_en: Gazzaev included the Moroccan national team among the contenders for victory in the World Cup
articles.lead_en: Also, the former head coach of the Russian national team included the teams of France, Spain and England among the favorites
articles.title_raw: Газзаев включил сборную Марокко в число претендентов на победу в ЧМ

articles.title_en: Russian pipeline gas supplies to EU gain 5% in 1H — IEA
articles.lead_en: The share of Russian piped gas in Europe’s gas demand stood at an estimated 8% in H1 2026, the agency noted

articles.title_en: State Duma speaker Volodin warns Russian lawmakers: don’t campaign on the fuel crisis
articles.lead_en: Russia’s State Duma Speaker Vyacheslav Volodin vowed that the country would resolve “problems at gas stations” the same way it had overcome other difficulties in recent years — through unity, not panic.

articles.title_en: The IEA expects Russian gas supplies to Uzbekistan to increase to 10 billion cubic meters in 2026. m
articles.lead_en: Russia continues to increase supplies to Uzbekistan through Kazakhstan via the Central Asia - Center pipeline system
articles.title_raw: МЭА ждет в 2026 году роста поставок российского газа в Узбекистан до 10 млрд куб. м
articles.lead_raw: Россия продолжает наращивать поставки в Узбекистан через Казахстан по трубопроводной системе "Средняя Азия - Центр"

articles.title_en: IEA: the Russian Federation increased pipeline gas supplies to the European Union by 5% in the first half of the year
articles.lead_en: Thus, the share of Russian pipeline gas in European gas demand in the first half of the year remained at 8%
articles.title_raw: МЭА: РФ в I полугодии увеличила трубопроводные поставки газа в Евросоюз на 5%
articles.lead_raw: Таким образом, доля российского трубопроводного газа в спросе Европы на газ в первом полугодии осталась на уровне 8%

articles.title_en: Ukraine strikes the Omsk oil refinery, Russia’s largest, forcing a shutdown
articles.lead_en: Ukrainian drones struck the Omsk oil refinery on July 6, halting operations at the facility, the Reuters news agency reported, citing sources.
articles.title_raw: Ukraine strikes the Omsk oil refinery, Russia’s largest, forcing a shutdown

articles.title_en: IEA: Russia increased LNG exports by 8% in the first half of the year
articles.lead_en: The growth was largely driven by increased gas supplies to European markets, the International Energy Agency said in a report.
articles.title_raw: МЭА: Россия в I полугодии увеличила экспорт СПГ на 8%
articles.lead_raw: Рост был в значительной степени обусловлен увеличением поставок газа на европейские рынки, говорится в отчете Международного энергетического агентства
